name: Cajun Shrimp Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and sauté for approximately four minutes until translucent.
2. Stir in garlic and cook for an additional minute.
3. Add thyme, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and basil. Cook at low heat for five more minutes.
4. Incorporate tomatoes, sugar, green onions, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, and chicken stock. Simmer over low heat for one hour, stirring occasionally.
5. Sauté shrimp in butter until just pink (not fully opaque), about 3-4 minutes per side.
6. Add cooked pasta to the skillet with shrimp and cheese. Toss well to combine.
7. Serve hot. Yields 4-6 servings.
